src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated ILoggingEvent.getMarker() with getMarkerList() to comply with SLF4J API changes in newer versions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: ILoggingEvent.getMarker() is deprecated and may be removed or behave differently in newer SLF4J versions; using getMarkerList() ensures compatibility with the current API.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update import statement to reflect the package rename of MongoAutoConfiguration in newer Spring Boot versions.
Replace com.fasterxml.jackson imports with tools.jackson imports to align with the new Jackson distribution used in the target framework version.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The class com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException and com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper are no longer available or are deprecated in favor of the tools.jackson package in the updated dependency tree, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the method signature to throw the new JacksonException instead of the removed JsonProcessingException.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: JsonProcessingException is no longer part of the available API in the new tools.jackson package, leading to a compilation error if referenced.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove deprecated @EnableWebSecurity annotation in favor of the default behavior in Spring Security 6.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The @EnableWebSecurity annotation is deprecated and removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes compilation errors or deprecation warnings that fail strict builds.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update HttpSecurity configuration to use the new lambda DSL and withDefaults() for CORS.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The old method signatures for configuring security features (like cors()) are removed in Spring Security 6; the new lambda-based API is required for compilation.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update frameOptions configuration to use the new FrameOptionsConfig class.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The frameOptions() method signature changed in Spring Security 6 to accept a Consumer<FrameOptionsConfig>; the old lambda style is incompatible.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Rename permissionsPolicy to permissionsPolicyHeader to match Spring Security 6 API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The method permissionsPolicy() was renamed to permissionsPolicyHeader() in Spring Security 6; the old method name does not exist.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update oauth2ResourceServer configuration to use withDefaults() for JWT.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The jwt() method signature changed in Spring Security 6 to require a Consumer<JwtAuthenticationConverter> or similar, often using withDefaults(); the old no-arg jwt() is removed.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update import for ConfigurableServletWebServerFactory to the new package location in Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The class org.springframework.boot.web.servlet.server.ConfigurableServletWebServerFactory was moved to org.springframework.boot.web.server.servlet in Spring Boot 3.x; using the old package causes a compile error.
